title: The Plateau Becomes a Race
description: Pages 11–15 focus on the plateau becomes a race, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Doflamingo Family, Senor Pink as kanjuro's drawings help the fighters climb the plateau, turning the absurd rescue into a practical route toward the palace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Come on, on your feet, Mr. speedo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This man... just kissed my lips....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: W... wait just a second, you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Just what the heck are you doing here?! Why would you do a thing like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: T-T-TAKE RE- SPONSIBILITY LIKE A MAN!! YOU'LL BE MY BOYFRIEND NOW, RIGHT?! OooOHHHHHHHHHHHHHHY YOU!! :D

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: The factory boss just got a bit more semi- nine!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: -Don't go all after him about it, factory boss... It's your fault for being so affected by it.

dialogue.speaker: Senor Pink
dialogue.text: Pink- SAMA....!! but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: How else would you plug up the flapping mouth of some dame...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Who won't stop butting into a matter between two grown men ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Just from getting kissed once or twice, you're all worked up like that...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're still a naive little Mama's girl who doesn't know anything of love or romance....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's nothing more than puppy love.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Anyhowever, the insurance

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And we're nothing more than heart- breakers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: HAAAH so

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: IyaA AAAAA AAAAAN :) What hot and hard- boiled hunks :)

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Senior..o Franky..o

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I won't let you destroy the FAC- Tory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Hmph....!! If you're a man, talk with your fists!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: The "Man's Fight" is about to begin ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: "Diaper Bomb!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: "Nipple Light Special"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Before the new Royal Palace [Pica statute]

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: How dare you!! You let Rebecca and them escape !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Oh, don't be so modest now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: It's all thanks to you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: -Don't get all cocky now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Because there is no way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I'll let scum like you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: The National Association

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Ever leave this place--!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: One more push!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: That battle looks pretty dangerous ahead! Watch where you land carefully.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: PURURURU RURURIRU!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: PURURO RURU...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Hello!! Leo here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Hang in there Mr. Chicken!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Ooooh, I still can't calm myself down...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Zoro- Senpai was just too- awesome...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Moussy!! I'm so glad you managed to free every- one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: But Leo, there's still a huge prob- Lem!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Princess mansherry isn't inside the factory!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Eh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Poor thing!! she's probably locked up somewhere crying, "moussy! moussy!" no doubt about it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: She might even be inside the "palace" that you are heading towards....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Former [King's Plateau]

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Head to the former King's Plateau" --!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Capture King Riku and God usop--!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: We're in for it now!!! What are we gonna do?! They're all headed this way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: C'mon Mr. King, we gotta get outta here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Father!! We've got a communication from the ton- tatta in the factory!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Princess mansherry is nowhere to be seen...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: What was that...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Now's not the time for casual conversa- Tion!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Every last person in the kingdom wants our heads right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: Well, if the entire kingdom is after us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Where do you propose we run?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Hngh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: The people of this country already know the truth about the past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: They wouldn't do anything terrible to father!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: ...and what about me?

summary: The Plateau Becomes a Race develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
